message:
feat(tui): event stream salience — severity-colored summaries and dimmed metadata

Error/Warn events now propagate severity styling to the kind label and
summary text for immediate visual salience.  Trace events dim the summary
for background noise reduction.  Timestamps and seq numbers use text_meta
styling to reduce cognitive competition with the event content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
